query:
UPDATE establishments SET address = REPLACE(address, 'Brg. ', 'Brigadeiro ') WHERE address LIKE '%Brg. %';
SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(address, ' ', 2), ' ', -1) as second_word FROM establishments WHERE address REGEXP ' [A-Z][a-z]{1,4}\\. ' LIMIT 20;
